name: Good Luck Rice Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the raw rice in 4 cups of water until almost tender.
2. Add sugar and cook until just done.
3. Stir in evaporated milk and raisins.
4. Mix pudding with a cup of milk and add it to the rice mixture.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff.
6. Beat yolks separately, then combine with egg whites.
7. Turn off heat.
8. Mix well. If thick, add more milk.
9. Serves 6 or more.
